violations.text: Paper towels observed at mop sink. A sink used for FOOD preparation or UTENSIL washing, or a service sink or curbed cleaning facility used for the disposal of mop water or similar wastes, may not be provided with the handwashing aids and devices required for a HANDWASHING SINK. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2026

Milk observed held at 48 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Milk was relocated to another refrigerator. Discussed options for maintaining cold temperatures of milk during busy times of service. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/14/2026
Ice bucket and blender bowls are not stored inverted. Water observed in ice bucket and blender bowl. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the back area. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine, and racks stored on the floor beside the Prep Unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris, especially near the hand sink in the front service area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the refrigerator, and liquor storage shelf. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Ham was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ham was placed in freezer to rapidly chill. Discussed not overfilling bins in the prep unit with PIC. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
The drainage from one ice bin observed draining into an open bucket. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The walls and ceiling in the kitchen above the blender have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The conduits into the electrical panel above a food prep area have an accumulation of cobwebs and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (the ice bin at the bar, and knives in the knife rack in the kitchen) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knives were taken out of service, and ice bin is to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Cheese in a plastic container inside a metal pan in the prep unit was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cheese was placed in the bottom of the prep unit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Food observed stored on the floor in the front service area, and on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Ice scoop at the bar observed stored with the handle in the ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Single service items observed stored on the floor and on shelves less than 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

Wood is used to line shelves on the rack in the storage area near the mop sink. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the knife rack have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. Paper & adhesive from old stickers observed on several food containers. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The drainage from one ice bin observed draining into a container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The floor especially beneath the mop sink in the storage room have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The outside area along the building has an accumulation of litter, debris, and leaf litter. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the front service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink in the front service area. A sanitizer bucket was observed in the hand sink at the bar area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

Boxes of coffee were observed stored on the floor in the storeroom. Canned and bottled beverages observed stored on the floor at the bar area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2024

The faucets at the hand sinks in the kitchen and bar areas are in poor repair. Inspector observed a faucet handle at each sink loose and not operating at the time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2024
